transcript.text:
[Noryangjin Fisheries Wholesale Market]
I've never seen this place this empty It's always been crowded
[The market is empty due to Covid-19]
[Purchasing webfoot octopus and hoping to show support for the workers]
Right now should be a very busy hour
Everywhere is empty just like this
There are safe ways to purchase from here like delivery or drive-thru
Please show support for these small business owners
I will take this home for mukbang
It's 4kg of webfoot octopus
[Small business owners and many others who are in trouble during this hard time, we will get through this together!]
[Let's cook]
I used to be too afraid to touch these
[Thoroughly washed and slightly cooked]
[Head is filled with eggs]
[Spicy stir-fried webfoot octopus]

Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang
I bought the webfoot octopus from the fisheries market
It's a total of 4kg
Live - 2kg Freshwater - 2kg which I cooked
It took me a while to cook this because the head was so big
I already ate a couple
They're still alive
I will eat these as shabu
Bon appetit
1 big guy
They're big
Should we eat this first?
The eggs Can you guys see it?
It's filled
I'll take these out

It's filled with eggs
That's amazing
Let's cut the head and cook it a bit more
Let's eat the body
I like dipping this in sesame oil
These are good without any sauce
That's insane
I made the broth myself
This one is seasoned
It's red
These were dead
Maybe just fainted
So I can't really tell the difference in flavor
Look at the size These are in season right now
Go inside
Eggs

It's almost like I'm eating rice with it
A very nutty rice
I have the fire chicken noodles sauce and the paldo bibimmyun spicy sauce
I wonder which one will be better
Live octopus is just too delicious
These are the way to go
Fire chicken sauce
Am I doing to die?
So good
Let's cut the head This one has intestines
There were so many eggs
These are filled with eggs
I think the small ones should be okay to eat Let's cut it open
Looks ready
That's really big
It won't come off

It became an ink broth
Incredible
These are ready
Really
It's so tender if you slightly cook the live webfoot octopus like this
These are still in season Almost ending though
It goes well with the fire chicken sauce
I will die from the spiciness
The chop-chop texture
The live ones are very nice
The intestines..
So savory
Insane
Should I just put everything in?
That's a lot
2 heads left except for these 2 bodies?

It's big, right?
Yum
Dip it in the fire chicken sauce,
Dye it red first
Cut it open for the eggs
That's amazing
Dip it in the sauce
Amazing
It's spicy
but tasty
I can't eat the legs
The body is okay I'll eat the legs later
That's too big
Oh no, the eggs are spilling out Eat it in 1 bite?
It's not cooked yet
It looks undercooked

Nevermind, it was perfectly cooked Delicious
Most of these have eggs
It's spicy
I made it
There's 3 left
I will put these in the refrigerator
I have 3 of these left
I will save these and eat it with Ramyun noodles
I want to eat it right now, but it's 2am right now
Hot
The broth became really salty
This is salty itself
Absolutely delicious
The broth boiled down too much
I don't think I can eat this
It's too spicy

It became even more spicy over time
[Chat: Wash it in the broth]
That's 1 way
It's salty
And it became too chewy
Is the broth just salt water now?
Let's try a little bit
The eggs
Amazing
Tasty
I'll wash this one too
I have no more drinks left
